key_insight: SINO unifies forward and inverse PDE solving by combining frequency-domain initialization with time-domain iterative refinement in a single neural operator.
engineering_relevance: It offers a practical surrogate for high-dimensional PDEs, targeting faster and more accurate prediction for simulation, parameter sweeps, imaging, and forecasting.
method: Frequency-domain module captures globally stable low-frequency structure.
Time-domain module iteratively reduces local solution residuals.
Designed to handle both forward simulation and inverse inference with spectral-spatiotemporal collaboration.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports experiments on Navier-Stokes and acoustic wave equations, plus super-resolution imaging and weather forecasting, showing strong accuracy, generalization, and robustness.
watch_item: Performance may depend on careful balancing of spectral and iterative components, especially for complex boundaries or long-horizon dynamics.
paper_title: Starter-Iterator Neural Operator: A Unified Architecture for High-Fidelity Forward and Inverse PDE Problems
